table-reference.title: Energy factor (CP or CS) for a circulating pump serving a Class 4 part of a building

ol.li: If no primary circulating pump is present, then CP=0MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4qamaaBa aaleaacaWGqbaabeaakiabg2da9iaaicdaaaa@398A@ R0lGODlhLgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAALgAYAAACU4SPqcvtD6OctNqLswrcBI10jQhwH1h6zBmi 6cG2SZzF9Otu8l6ZPm3T5YSq2ZCIgyFNmx+pCOXdPrfIqephGpOUZ9d7dGDDizF5Bj6r1+y2e1EA ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx5gUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVz IE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0 EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9B Kl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDQwADABsAAAsBAAIAg1AA AAEBAAoCBIY9AD0CAIgwAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz+Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/Pjwh LS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1M IDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgv TWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5DPC9taT48bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9tc3ViPjxtbz49 PC9tbz48bW4+MDwvbW4+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYIAAAAAAAAOw==.

If no secondary circulating pump is present, then CS=0MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4qamaaBa aaleaacaWGtbaabeaakiabg2da9iaaicdaaaa@398D@ R0lGODlhLgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAALgAYAAACUISPqcvtD6OctNqLswrcBH10jghwH3ieixqC JcLCm8vGnsvU62X2sT7DBW9DYeuYsOl+PhLxmZS1nJPUyBTVUClbY8Tm3UHDOSz5jE6r15UCACH/ C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx5gUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5l dyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9H X0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9E X0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDQwADABsAAAsBAAIAg1MAAAEB AAoCBIY9AD0CAIgwAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz+Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0g TWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIu MCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0 aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5DPC9taT48bWk+UzwvbWk+PC9tc3ViPjxtbz49PC9t bz48bW4+MDwvbW4+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtN YXRoVHlwZTAwMgYIAAAAAAAAOw==.
